app.title: AuraRPC
lang.label: English
sidebar.title: Presets
sidebar.subtitle: your saved statuses
section.identity.help: the basics to connect with Discord
section.party.help: for activities that fit multiple people
section.time.help: when this started, if you want to show it
section.large.help: fills the main slot next to the text
section.small.help: overlaid on the corner of the large one
section.buttons.help: up to two clickable links others can see
field.client_id.help: the numeric id Discord gave you when you created your app
field.type.help: which word appears before the name
field.display.help: which field becomes the visible title
display.name: Name
field.name: Name
field.name.help: the main title — usually the name of the game or app
field.details.help: first line under the title — what exactly you're doing
field.state.help: second line — a nuance or extra context
field.party_max.help: how many fit in total — 0 to hide
time.since_connect.help: counts from the moment you start the presence
time.since_start.help: counts from when the program launched
time.custom.help: pick a start (and an end if you want)
field.image_key.help: the asset name you uploaded in Discord's portal, or a direct image url
field.image_text.help: what people see when they hover over the image
field.image_url.help: where it leads if someone clicks it — optional
field.button_text.help: what reads inside the button — max 32 characters
settings.title: Preferences
settings.autostart.help: Launch AuraRPC automatically when you sign in.
settings.start_minimized.help: Open straight to the tray, without the window.
settings.check_updates.help: On launch, ask GitHub if a newer version exists. Nothing is downloaded automatically.
update.banner: A new version of AuraRPC is available (%s).
error.banner.title: Check the form
error.details_min: Details needs at least 2 characters (spaces don't count) or be left empty.
error.state_min: State needs at least 2 characters (spaces don't count) or be left empty.
error.text_too_long: Some field exceeds the allowed character limit.
error.url_invalid: URLs must start with http:// or https://.
error.url_host: URLs must include a domain, e.g. https://example.com.
error.name: Preset name must be 1-64 characters.
error.button: Each button needs both label and link, or to stay empty.
error.party: Current people can't exceed the max party size.
